title: Rich Red Lentil Norwegian Lentil Bowl
description: Savory, chewy, and festive, this Norwegian dish features red lentils, a shio-koji cure, and a dash-friendly flavor profile. Serve in a scallop shell for a unique and memorable experience.
instructions: In a large pot, combine the red lentils and water.
Bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 25 minutes.
While the lentils cook, mix the shio-koji cure and brown butter in a small bowl until well combined.
Add the fresh dill, lemon juice, ginger, scallions, salt, and black pepper to the bowl and stir to combine.
In a separate pot, heat the olive oil over low heat.
Add the dashi broth and stir to combine.
Once the lentils are cooked, drain and add them to the pot with the dashi broth mixture.
Stir to combine and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Serve the lentils in a scallop shell, topped with the shio-koji cure mixture and a drizzle of olive oil.
